_comment: Collab Repost system — Firebase Realtime Database security rules.
_instructions: 1. Open Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules tab
2. Merge the 'rules' object below into your existing rules JSON
3. These rules complement firebase_repost_rules.json — both are needed

_firebase_paths.collabRepostInvites/{collaboratorUid}/{i: Pending/processed invites received by a user
_firebase_paths.collabRepostSent/{initiatorUid}/{inviteI: Invites sent by a user (initiator's copy)

$collabRepostId..write: auth != null && (data.child('initiatorUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('collaboratorUid').val() === auth.uid || (!data.exists() && newData.child('initiatorUid').val() === auth.uid))
